description: Xquik Terraform provider for X/Twitter workflows with resources for monitors, webhooks, API keys, tweet workflows, draws, and extraction jobs. Not affiliated with X Corp.
rules: Start with docs/CONTEXT7.md for install, auth, first resources, data sources, examples, and agent safety rules.
Authenticate with provider fields or the documented X_TWITTER_SCRAPER_* environment variables.
Use docs/guides/quickstart.md for Registry installation, authentication, first resources, and validation.
Use docs/index.md for provider schema and supported provider fields.
Use docs/resources for resource schemas such as monitors, webhooks, API keys, drafts, tweet actions, profile updates, styles, and support tickets.
Use docs/data-sources for account, monitor, webhook, tweet, user, draw, extraction, event, draft, style, and support ticket lookups.
Use examples/provider, examples/resources, and examples/data-sources for copyable Terraform blocks.
Pin the provider to a compatible 0.2 release and initialize it from the Terraform Registry.
Never commit API keys, bearer tokens, local credentials, Terraform state files, .terraformrc files, or local provider binaries.
